posts.short_post:
Small businesses lose leads when follow-up is inconsistent.

SoftJunk has free follow-up templates, a $5 lead follow-up kit, and a $5 custom 7-day sequence for one business.

Template library:

Pay $5:

posts.email_pitch:
Subject: $5 follow-up sequence for your leads

Saw this small tool for businesses that get leads from forms, DMs, calls, referrals, or quote requests.

It has a free template library, a lead loss calculator, a free 3-message preview, and a $5 custom follow-up sequence with Day 0, 1, 3, 5, and 7 messages.

Template library:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-templates.html

PayPal:
https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD
